note: These videos are served via Cloudflare R2 HLS (not Cloudflare Stream). Both modules were already transcoded and uploaded to R2 prior to this task.
cloudflare_stream_status: NOT_SUBSCRIBED - Cloudflare Stream is not enabled on either CF account. Account subscriptions: Images Basic, R2 Paid, SSL for SaaS, Teams Free. Stream requires a separate paid add-on.

action_required.training_page: Both video cards were removed from TRAINING_VIDEOS array. They need to be re-added. HLS URLs are ready and live.
action_required.module_2_poster: No poster.jpg for module-2. Either extract a frame from the MP4 or use a placeholder.
action_required.cloudflare_stream: If Cloudflare Stream transcoding is specifically required (for adaptive bitrate ABR or DRM), you would need to subscribe at dash.cloudflare.com -> Stream. Current R2 HLS serves single-bitrate segments which works for most use cases.
